mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SUGGESTION ( ID, SUGGESTION_TITLE, IS_ADDED_LIST, CHECKLIST_ID, MEMBER_ID, PROJECT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_SUGGESTION.NEXTVAL, #{suggestionTitle}, 'N', #{checklistId}, #{memberId}, #{projectId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, SUGGESTION_TITLE AS suggestionTitle, IS_ADDED_LIST AS isAddedList, CHECKLIST_ID AS checklistId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, PROJECT_ID AS projectId FROM TBL_SUGGESTION WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY ID DESC
